answers.value: Proposed two-lot Torrens Title subdivision of an existing residential property containing a single dwelling at 12 Bangalley Street, Avalon Beach NSW 2107. The existing detached dwelling house is to be retained on proposed Lot 23A with minor adjustments to internal fencing and services, while a new vacant residential lot (proposed Lot 23B) will be created at the rear of the property with access provided via a new 4.0m wide driveway along the eastern side boundary. The application seeks certification that all conditions of Development Consent DA2023/1456 (Northern Beaches Council) relating to subdivision have been fully satisfied, including completion of stormwater drainage works, provision of separate water, sewer, electricity and NBN connections to both proposed lots, construction of the shared concrete driveway and turning area to Council’s specifications, and registration of required easements for services and rights-of-carriageway. No demolition of the existing dwelling is proposed; only removal of an old timber garden shed and some internal landscaping works have been undertaken as part of civil works to facilitate the subdivision. The intent is for Lot 23A to continue as a family home occupied by the current owners, while Lot 23B will be sold as a vacant lot for future construction of a single dwelling in accordance with the approved building envelope and all relevant planning controls.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form
